title: Merge real track status and weather
summary: Pit calls are strongly affected by safety cars, VSC, rain, and track temperature, but the current features only infer these indirectly from compounds and lap times.
rationale: Pit calls are strongly affected by safety cars, VSC, rain, and track temperature, but the current features only infer these indirectly from compounds and lap times. FastF1/OpenF1 expose track status, weather, pit timing, tyre, and lap data for F1 sessions.
implementation_hint: Map Year+Race+LapNumber to external FastF1/OpenF1 current-lap TrackStatus, Rainfall, TrackTemp, AirTemp, Wind, and lagged changes. Use only current/past lap values in validation; add missing-source flags for unmatched races or pre-season rows.
expected_effect: Should improve wet-weather transitions, caution-period pit discounts, and anomalous pit clusters not captured by tyre-life thresholds.
risk: Race-name/session matching may be messy; external data coverage may be incomplete for synthetic or pre-season rows; next-lap weather/status would leak if used carelessly.
